name: Apple Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, oil, eggs, salt, and vanilla in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Gradually add flour and baking soda to the mixture, stirring continuously until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Fold in the chopped walnuts and finely chopped apples until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
4. Grease a 9 x 13 inch pan with cooking spray or butter.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread it evenly.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
7. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool in the pan for 10-15 minutes before removing it from the pan.
